description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 15, 2025 at 4:07 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Military Avenue near Sproul Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeastbound on Military Avenue in autonomous mode when it approached a passenger car exiting a 
driveway on the west side of Military Avenue, with the rear of the passenger car partially in the roadway. The test driver transitioned the 
Waymo AV to manual mode and slowed to a stop. A passenger car traveling southeastbound on Military Avenue approached the Waymo 
AV from behind, and the front of the passenger car made contact with the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo 
AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
